'''Jack Logan''' (born 8 September 1995) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played as a {{rlp|ce}} for the [[York City Knights]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

He previously played for [[Hull F.C.]] in the [[Super League]], and has spent time on loan from [[Hull F.C.|Hull]] at [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]], [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] in the [[Super League]] and the [[Toronto Wolfpack]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]]. He has also played for the [[Batley Bulldogs]] in the [[RFL Championship]], and on loan from [[Batley Bulldogs|Batley]] at [[Hull F.C.|FC]] in the [[Betfred Super League|top flight]].

==Background==
Logan was born in [[Kingston upon Hull]], [[Humberside]], England.

==Playing career==
===Hull FC===
On 18 July 2014, Logan made his début for Hull in their [[Super League XIX|2014]] [[Super League]] match against [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]] at the [[DW Stadium]].{{citation needed|date=March 2023}}

===Doncaster RLFC===
Logan is dual registered with [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]] in the [[Championship (rugby league)|Championship]], and played two games for the club.{{citation needed|date=March 2023}}

===Toronto Wolfpack===
Logan spent time on loan at the [[Toronto Wolfpack]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]] during the 2019 season.{{citation needed|date=March 2023}}

===Batley Bulldogs===
On 22 February 2021 it was reported that he had signed for the [[Batley Bulldogs]] in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=22 Feb 2021|accessdate=23 Feb 2021|title=Former Hull centre Jack Logan joins Batley|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/former-hull-centre-jack-logan-joins-batley/}}</ref>

===Hull F.C. (loan)===
On 22 June 2021 it was reported that he had signed for [[Hull F.C.]] in the [[Super League]] on loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Hull Daily Mail|date=22 Jun 2021|accessdate=22 Jun 2021|title=Hull FC re-sign centre Jack Logan in shock loan deal|url=https://www.hulldailymail.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/hull-fc-jack-logan-loan-5559462}}</ref>

===Leigh Centurions===
On 4 August 2021 it was reported that he had signed for the [[Leigh Centurions]] in the [[Super League]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=4 Aug 2021|accessdate=4 Aug 2021|title=Leigh sign Jack Logan with immediate effect|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/leigh-sign-jack-logan-with-immediate-effect/}}</ref>

===York City Knights===
On 13 November 2021 it was reported that he had signed for [[York City Knights|York]] in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=13 Nov 2021|accessdate=24 Dec 2021|title=Former Super League centre Jack Logan joins York|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/former-super-league-centre-jack-logan-joins-york/}}</ref>
